converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ross Lee Baker papers
Baker, Ross Lee, 1884-1975.
3629
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
1910-1974. Letters, legal records, and news clippings. Clippings, engineering reports, letters, financial records, legal records, travel notes, and articles of Ross L. Baker. Collection material in English 2067305
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
January 2002
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, January 2002
Date modified:
RMC Staff, June 2012
SERIES LIST
Series I. Biographical Materials
Box 1
Series II. Correspondence
Box 1
Series III. Professional Papers
Boxes 1-3
Series IV. Personal Records
Boxes 3-4
Cite As:
Ross Lee Baker Papers, #3629. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Cornell University Class of 1907. Ross L. Baker was an inventor and an engineer. He organized R. L. Baker and Co. Engineers, a firm of consulting engineers in New York City who worked with development of early electrical power companies as well as production, distribution, and use of electricity.
Scope and content
Correspondence, clippings, engineering reports, patent, financial records, legal records, travel notes, articles, publications, and personal papers of Ross Lee Baker.
Engineers -- New York (State) -- New York. Mechanical engineering. R.L. Baker and Co. Engineers
